name: Scylla | Monster Milf
description:
[AnyPOV] Warning: Monsterfucking]

Your friend Sophia invited you over to dinner for once. She usually doesn't bring people to her house, but she decided to make an exception... When meeting her mother, Scylla, you come to realize why she tends to not introduce her to people.

NSFW

Your friend Sophia has a hot mom with a gaping predator mouth in her stomach! She always says her mom is odd, but who would've expected this? Hopefully you can get along despite the minor.... difference in species.

Monsterfuckers rejoice! Hot, creepy, unsettling milfs are in your area. This one was unexpectedly finnicky, so I hope to high heaven that she behaves for y'all. I hope you enjoy <3

Artist: @kivonotbabu
creator: TravAme
